name: Moderation Queue Item
description: Submission card for the admin moderation queue showing content preview, submitter info, reputation score, and approve/reject action buttons.

standard.description: Full moderation card with content preview, submitter avatar, reputation score, submission date, and approve/reject buttons.

slots.header: Type badge, content name, and submission timestamp
slots.submitter: Avatar, username, reputation score badge, and trust indicator
slots.preview: Content description and truncated JSON preview
slots.actions: Approve Button (success), Reject Button (destructive), View Detail link

compact.description: Compact single-row moderation item for dense queue views. Inline approve/reject icons.

slots.content-info: Type badge, name, and short description inline
